query: SELECT eg.id, eg.name as grupo, COUNT(em.id) as total_membros FROM jigsawExpertGroups eg LEFT JOIN jigsawExpertMembers em ON em.expertGroupId = eg.id GROUP BY eg.id, eg.name ORDER BY eg.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3C9YCXxCojabUDk.eefe8f8e8b67 --database FUZ2ecmXaKXVi9q85vHrsr --execute SELECT eg.id, eg.name as grupo, COUNT(em.id) as total_membros FROM jigsawExpertGroups eg LEFT JOIN jigsawExpertMembers em ON em.expertGroupId = eg.id GROUP BY eg.id, eg.name ORDER BY eg.id;
